evals.prompt: 변경된 코드의 웹 성능 이슈를 검토해줘
evals.expected_output: PERF-01~11 기준으로 대상 파일 분석, 구체적 이슈 식별
expectations: Analyzes target files for performance issues (not just lists items)
Identifies CRP issues (render-blocking CSS/JS, inline critical CSS)
Identifies image optimization issues (format, lazy loading, dimensions)
References PERF item IDs in findings
Provides specific optimization recommendations with code examples

evals.prompt: index.html의 이미지 최적화와 리소스 로딩 성능을 점검해줘
evals.expected_output: PERF-04~06 이미지 항목과 PERF-01~03 CRP 항목 중심 분석
expectations: Checks lazy loading implementation for below-fold images
Evaluates resource loading order (preload, defer, async)

evals.prompt: dashboard.tsx의 JavaScript 번들 크기와 실행 성능을 분석해줘
evals.expected_output: PERF-07~09 JS 항목 중심 분석, 번들/코드 스플리팅 제안
expectations: Evaluates JavaScript bundle impact (PERF-07 through PERF-09)
Checks for code splitting opportunities (dynamic import)
Identifies heavy computations that could block main thread
Suggests tree-shaking or lazy loading strategies
